title: psoralea monophylla
intro: Psoralea monophylla, also known as the one-leafed psoralea or wolf's bane, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-parasitic properties. The health benefits of Psoralea monophylla include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions.
